user.description: Setup for the Green Planet Energy electricity price integration

config_entry_not_loaded.message: This integration instance is not currently loaded

no_config_entry.message: No matching integration instance was found

no_data_available.message: No price data available for the requested duration and time range

get_cheapest_duration.description: Retrieve electricity price data. Use `cheapest_window` to find the cheapest consecutive time window for a given duration, or `price_schedule` to get the full list of hourly prices for a time range.

duration.description: Duration in hours for which to find the cheapest time window.
duration.name: Duration

mode.description: Result mode: `cheapest_window` returns the optimal start time and average price for a given duration; `price_schedule` returns the raw per-hour prices within that cheapest window.
mode.name: Mode

get_cheapest_duration.name: Get cheapest duration
